name: Check of menu bar in Palace
fullName: Menu Bar: Check of menu bar in Palace

steps.name: When  I add 'Palace Bookshelf' account from welcomeScreen
Then  There is a menu bar at the bottom of the screen
And  There are tabs 'Catalog', 'My Books' and 'Settings' on application screen

labels.value: Check of menu bar in Palace
